name: Reliance Industries Limited
description: Reliance Industries Limited engages in the hydrocarbon exploration and production, oil and chemicals, retail, and digital service businesses worldwide. It operates through Oil to Chemicals, Oil and Gas, Retail, Digital Services, and Others segments. The company offers refining and marketing products, including liquefied petroleum gas, propylene, naphtha, gasoline, jet/aviation turbine fuel, kerosine oil, diesel, sulphur, and petroleum coke.
